SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl

Package com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.export

package com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.export
JSON export data transfer objects for intelligence products.

This package contains DTOs for exporting intelligence data as JSON, supporting CDN-ready static file generation and API responses.

Key Classes

  • ExportMetadata - Common metadata for all exports
  • RiskAssessmentExportDTO - Risk assessment violations
  • CoalitionAlignmentExportDTO - Party alignment matrix
  • TemporalTrendsExportDTO - Temporal trend analysis

Usage

These DTOs are populated by IntelligenceExportServiceImpl and serialized to JSON using Jackson ObjectMapper with pretty-print and ISO 8601 date formatting.

Since:
v1.36 (Intelligence Products JSON Export)
Author:
intelligence-operative
